scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @telebid/api" "npm run dev -w @telebid/web"
scripts.research: npm run research:up && npm run research:wait && npm run research:pilot
scripts.research:pilot: CONTROL_API_URL=http://localhost:8081 OBSERVER_API_URL=http://localhost:8667 TOXIPROXY_API_URL=http://localhost:8475 TOXIPROXY_UPSTREAM=api:8080 npm run research:pilot -w @telebid/load
scripts.research:quick: CONTROL_API_URL=http://localhost:8081 OBSERVER_API_URL=http://localhost:8667 TOXIPROXY_API_URL=http://localhost:8475 TOXIPROXY_UPSTREAM=api:8080 npm run research:quick -w @telebid/load
scripts.lab: npm run lab:up && npm run lab:wait && npm run lab:test
scripts.telegram:logs: docker compose --profile telegram logs -f api web cloudflared
